</function>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The segmentation shows the same button objects before and after. The only change was in row 1 (the HUD bar). So clicking the left panel button at row 33, col 7 didn't actually change the button state - it was just a wasted action that advanced the timer.
This means row 33, col 7 is NOT a clickable button location. The buttons must be somewhere else.
Let me reconsider the button structure. In Level 1, the buttons were at row 42 (horizontal bars) and rows 44-46 (vertical bars). The clickable areas were the horizontal bars at row 42.
Looking at Level 2, the left panel has:
- Row 33: BBB (dark gray horizontal bars) - these might be the clickable buttons
- Rows 35-37: w (light gray vertical bars)
- Row 39: www (light gray horizontal bars)
- etc.
But clicking at row 33, col 7 didn't change anything. Maybe the buttons are at a different row?
Wait, let me look at the bottom squares more carefully. The left blue square at rows 54-62, cols 7-17 has a pattern inside. Maybe I need to click on the blue squares themselves, not the button bars?
Or maybe the buttons are the small black bars at row 33? Let me look at the ASCII again:
Row 33: BggggggBBBggBBBggBBBggBBBggggggB
The BBB cells are at cols 7-9, 12-14, 17-19, 22-24. These are dark gray (B) bars on a gray (g) background.
But clicking at row 33, col 7 didn't change anything. Maybe I need to click on the vertical bars instead?
Let me try clicking on a vertical bar at row 36, col 8.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The segmentation shows the same button objects before and after. The only change was in row 1 (the HUD bar). So clicking the left panel button at row 33, col 7 didn't actually change the button state - it was just a wasted action that advanced the timer.
This means row 33, col 7 is NOT a clickable button location. The buttons must be somewhere else.
Let me reconsider the button structure. In Level 1, the buttons were at row 42 (horizontal bars) and rows 44-46 (vertical bars). The clickable areas were the horizontal bars at row 42.
Looking at Level 2, the left panel has:
- Row 33: BBB (dark gray horizontal bars) - these might be the clickable buttons
- Rows 35-37: w (light gray vertical bars)
- Row 39: www (light gray horizontal bars)
- etc.
But clicking at row 33, col 7 didn't change anything. Maybe the buttons are at a different row?
Wait, let me look at the bottom squares more carefully. The left blue square at rows 54-62, cols 7-17 has a pattern inside. Maybe I need to click on the blue squares themselves, not the button bars?
Or maybe the buttons are the small black bars at row 33? Let me look at the ASCII again:
Row 33: BggggggBBBggBBBggBBBggBBBggggggB
The BBB cells are at cols 7-9, 12-14, 17-19, 22-24. These are dark gray (B) bars on a gray (g) background.
But clicking at row 33, col 7 didn't change anything. Maybe I need to click on the vertical bars instead?
Let me try clicking on a vertical bar at row 36, col 8.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Let me try clicking on the vertical bars instead
# Left panel vertical bars are at rows 35-37, cols 8, 13, 18, 23

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 8}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
